title: Doğuş University Lecturer Ali Batuhan Yıldız’s Workshop Leadership Accepted at an International Conference
content:
Student

News

Details

Date: 31 October 2025

Doğuş University Lecturer Ali Batuhan Yıldız’s Workshop Leadership Accepted at an International Conference

Ali Batuhan Yıldız, Lecturer at Doğuş University (DOU), has been appointed as the chair of Workshop 1 titled “Beyond Automation: Human-Centered AI for the Future of Online Learning”, which will be held as part of the International Human-Computer Interaction for Industrial Applications (HCIA 2026) Conference.

The workshop has been officially accepted following the evaluation of the conference’s scientific committee. Accordingly, Lecturer Ali Batuhan Yıldız will represent Doğuş University (DOU) at the conference as the

Workshop Chair

.

The HCIA 2026 Conference will be held in Singapore on

.

🔗

https://www.openacdemic.com/hcia-2026-2/

As Doğuş University, we congratulate him for his academic contributions.
